title: ilex peragua
intro: Ilex peragua, also known as the Peruvian Holly or American Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like alkaloids and flavonoids. Consuming Ilex peragua is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Ilex peragua can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
